creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Two more after the report:
https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-i386-test/5992/testReport/sys.kern/pdeathsig/signal_delivered_ptrace/
https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-i386-test/5975/testReport/sys.kern/pdeathsig/signal_delivered_ptrace/

This also happened once on amd64:
https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-amd64-test/8861/testReport/junit/sys.kern/pdeathsig/signal_delivered_ptrace/
